page.content: In the Q1 2024 report for CRH plc regarding Material cost inflation indices, the table details various material types with their respective cost indices and outlooks.

lines.text: In the Q1 2024 report for CRH plc regarding Material cost inflation indices, the table details various material types with their

page.content: The headers include MaterialType, CostIndex(%), ChangefromQ42023, and OutlookforQ22024, reflecting the dynamics of the construction materials market. Cement exhibits a cost index of 8.5% with a change from Q4 2023 of 2.0%, while Steel follows with a cost index of 12.3% and a change from Q4 2023 of 3.5%. Lumber shows a cost index of 5.7% with a decrease of 1.2%, Concrete has a cost index of 6.1% with an increase of 1.0%, Bricks present a cost index of 4.3% with no change, and Aggregates report a cost index of 3.9% with a slight increase of 0.5%. The Infrastructure spending allocations table lists projects where CityLinkRoad is ongoing, categorized under RoadImprovements with an amount of £1.5M and a percentage change of 5.0%. RiverBridge has been completed, categorized as BridgeConstruction with an amount of £3.2M and a percentage change of 12.0%. HighwayUpgrade is planned under RoadMaintenance with an amount of £800K and a percentage change of 2.5%. UrbanPark is ongoing in Landscaping with an amount of £500K and a percentage change of 0.0%. Finally, MetroExpansion is in progress under TransitInfrastructure with an amount of £4.0M and a percentage change of 8.5%.
